x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: PromptStream.AI CLI — Build, validate, analyze, and generate prompts interactively.

commands.name: build
commands.description: Render a prompt template with variable substitution.

commands.name: validate
commands.description: Validate a prompt and check token limits.

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Build, validate, and generate a model response.

commands.name: analyze
commands.description: Analyze a prompt and estimate token and cost metrics.

commands.name: context
commands.description: View, save, summarize, or clear conversation contexts.
